# /grow — Wishlist
# Ideas for future auto-generated pages.
# Format: [tag] Title — short description
# Tags: game | tool | art | story
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# ── 160 New Ideas ────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Games (40)
[game]  Potato War Sim        — out-farm a rival squid using complex math and raw dedication
[game]  Compass Manhunt       — evade multiple hunters in a procedurally generated wilderness
[game]  Barrel Horror         — navigate a dark cellar with limited lantern oil and hostile props
[game]  Block Clutch Practice — fall into the void, place blocks on the wall to survive
[game]  Anarchy Ruler         — build a syndicate on a server with no rules, wearing a pig crown
[game]  Happy Physics Cart    — violently unfair 2D ragdoll driving over impossible gaps
[game]  Blood God Battles     — 1v1 arena combat focusing on strafing, crits, and fishing rods
[game]  MLG Water Drop        — jump from the skybox, land in a single block of water
[game]  Orphan Obliterator    — fast-paced hack and slash boss rush, purely for the loot
[game]  Portal Speedrun       — calculate perfect Nether portal coordinates using obsidian casting
[game]  Meme Reviewer         — rate procedurally generated internet images while dodging bans
[game]  Bridge Builder Pro    — click at 20 CPS to bridge across the void without sneaking
[game]  Pug Simulator         — play as a pair of pugs solving puzzles in a chaotic household
[game]  Ender Pearl Stasis    — trigger teleportation traps to escape impossible combat scenarios
[game]  Floor is Lava Parkour — pixel-perfect jumping across disappearing slime blocks
[game]  Skyblock Economist    — crash the virtual economy with an automated mob farm
[game]  Brofist Brawler       — side-scrolling beat-em-up with absurd power-ups and tambourines
[game]  TNT Cannon Crafter    — engineer redstone artillery to breach obsidian walls
[game]  Blind Speedrun        — memorize audio cues to beat the final boss without looking
[game]  Amnesia Clone         — run and hide from terrifying monsters, no weapons allowed
[game]  Wither Spawner        — gather skulls and sand to unleash chaos on your enemies' base
[game]  Boat Ice Racing       — drift wooden boats on blue ice tracks at Mach 3
[game]  Sub Bot Defender      — fight off an army of automated accounts to maintain your sub lead
[game]  Axe PvP Tactics       — manage shield cooldowns and axe crits in sweaty duels
[game]  Half Heart Hardcore   — survive a massive open world where literally any damage is fatal
[game]  Yoyo Trickster        — physics-based rhythm game mimicking classic trick videos
[game]  End Crystal Bomber    — chaotic, explosive combat meta relying on indestructible crystals
[game]  Trap Crafter          — lure hunters into elaborate TNT and cobweb traps
[game]  Flappy Rage           — an impossibly frustrating arcade clone that makes you yell
[game]  Elytra Flight Sim     — thread the needle through tiny rings while diving with fireworks
[game]  Pig Jousting          — ride saddle-equipped hogs into tournament combat
[game]  Speedbridger          — hold the optimal angle to bridge without falling off the edge
[game]  Sandbox Torture       — put NPCs in increasingly ridiculous and deadly contraptions
[game]  Potion Brewer         — memorize complex recipes to gain tactical buffs mid-combat
[game]  Nether Navigation     — survive ghast fireballs while bridging over a sea of lava
[game]  G-Fuel Tycoon         — manage a powdery energy drink empire for hardcore gamers
[game]  Hunger Games Arena    — loot the cornucopia and survive a 24-player battle royale
[game]  Techno's Library      — decipher ancient combat texts and apply Sun Tzu quotes to PvP
[game]  Manhunt Analysis      — rewind and analyze 200 IQ plays to see if they were scripted
[game]  Dragon Perch          — predict the dragon's landing sequence to deal massive bed damage

# Tools (40)
[tool]  Fourier Tracer        — draw a closed curve, output the spinning epicycles that generate it
[tool]  Vector Flow Viz       — input differential equations, watch the glowing vector field evolve
[tool]  Basis Transformer     — drag basis vectors to see how the entire 2D plane morphs
[tool]  Pi Collision Sim      — count perfectly elastic blocks bouncing to calculate digits of Pi
[tool]  Neural Net Layers     — peek inside a perceptron network to see how it separates data
[tool]  Quaternion Sphere     — visualize 4D rotations mapped onto a stereographic 3D projection
[tool]  Taylor Series Graph   — add polynomial terms and watch them hug the sine wave
[tool]  Eigenvalue Finder     — visually locate vectors that only scale during a transformation
[tool]  Divergence Map        — visualize fluid sources and sinks in a continuous vector field
[tool]  Curl Calculator       — drop a virtual paddlewheel in a vector field to measure rotation
[tool]  Gradient Ascent       — drop a marble on a 3D loss function surface to find local minima
[tool]  Prime Spiral          — highlight prime numbers on an expanding polar coordinate grid
[tool]  Matrix Multiplier     — step-by-step visualizer of rows dipping into columns
[tool]  Complex Mapper        — see how a grid transforms under complex mapping functions
[tool]  Normal Dist Board     — drop balls through a Galton board to form a bell curve
[tool]  Riemann Sums Calc     — slice the area under a curve into increasingly thin rectangles
[tool]  Laplace Transform     — convert a time-domain wave into its s-domain frequency peaks
[tool]  Markov Chain Sim      — watch state transitions flow between nodes based on probabilities
[tool]  Cross Product Viz     — see the orthogonal parallelogram area generated by two vectors
[tool]  Dot Product Projector — cast shadows of one vector onto another to find the scalar
[tool]  Topology Morpher      — continuous deformation animation of a coffee mug into a donut
[tool]  Logistic Map          — slide the growth rate parameter to watch chaos theory emerge
[tool]  Calculus Chain Rule   — visual gears representing nested derivatives turning one another
[tool]  Bayes Theorem Tree    — dynamic branching paths showing conditional probabilities
[tool]  Binomial Expander     — Pascal's triangle interactive generator with combinatorics rules
[tool]  Path Integral Sim     — sum over all possible particle histories in a double-slit setup
[tool]  Manim Boilerplate     — visual UI to generate the Python code for elegant math animations
[tool]  Heat Equation         — simulate thermal dispersion across a 2D metal plate over time
[tool]  Wave Equation         — pluck a virtual 1D string to see harmonic standing waves
[tool]  Determinant Area      — watch how the area of a square scales under a 2x2 matrix change
[tool]  Fractional Dimensions — calculate the Hausdorff dimension of Sierpinski triangles
[tool]  Graph Isomorphism     — untangle nodes to see if two network graphs are actually the same
[tool]  Tensegrity Simulator  — build floating structures held together purely by tension lines
[tool]  Mobius Strip Gen      — parametric slider to twist and connect a 3D ribbon of paper
[tool]  Conic Sections        — slice a double cone with a 3D plane to reveal ellipses and parabolas
[tool]  Proof by Induction    — visual dominoes falling to prove mathematical statements
[tool]  Cellular Automata     — 1D Rule 30 generator showing complex patterns from simple rules
[tool]  Newton's Method       — follow tangent lines down a curve to find its roots iteratively
[tool]  Stereo Projection     — shine a light through a sphere to map its surface to a plane
[tool]  Harmonic Oscillator   — perfectly damped, underdamped, and overdamped spring masses

# Art (40)
[art]   Strange Attractors    — chaotic, infinitely wrapping particle trails in deep space
[art]   Mandelbulb 3D         — a volumetric, fractal voyage into the third dimension
[art]   Chladni Sand Patterns — acoustic resonance mapping with generative black sand
[art]   Voronoi Stained Glass — cell-fracture algorithms generating cathedral-style windows
[art]   Double Pendulum       — long-exposure light painting of chaotic swinging motion
[art]   L-System Trees        — recursive botanical sketches generating infinite oak variations
[art]   Interference Ripples  — intersecting wave patterns creating beautiful moiré illusions
[art]   Lissajous Webs        — parametric curves spinning into dense, hypnotic thread art
[art]   Conway's Canvas       — Game of Life cells treated as pixel-art color blooms
[art]   Perlin Topography     — smoothly undulating mountain maps colored by elevation
[art]   Raymarched Spheres    — infinitely repeating glass orbs reflecting each other
[art]   Magnetic Field Lines  — iron filings snapping to invisible, animated polar forces
[art]   Fractal Brownian      — generating hyper-realistic, jagged cloud formations
[art]   Reaction-Diffusion    — Turing patterns simulating the spots on a leopard's skin
[art]   Hex Tessellations     — infinitely folding Escher-style geometric animals
[art]   Golden Ratio Spirals  — Fibonacci sequences drawn as expanding nautilus shells
[art]   Slime Mold Network    — simulating Physarum polycephalum finding food sources
[art]   Gravitational Lensing — bending a starry background texture around a black hole
[art]   Fluid Vortex Shedding — beautiful, repeating swirls behind an object in a stream
[art]   Quantum Superposition — hazy, probabilistic electron clouds snapping to specific orbitals
[art]   Isometric Tesseracts  — 4D hypercubes rotating their inner faces to the outside
[art]   Spirograph Galaxy     — hypotrochoids orbiting a central barycenter
[art]   Generative Origami    — folding virtual paper into mathematically perfect cranes
[art]   Poisson Disc Sampling — perfectly distributed, non-overlapping organic dot patterns
[art]   Superformula Shapes   — tweaking parameters to generate starfish, leaves, and astroids
[art]   Penrose Tiling        — aperiodic dart and kite patterns that never repeat the same way
[art]   Boids Flocking        — thousands of glowing arrows swarming like starlings at dusk
[art]   Gyroid Surfaces       — infinitely connected, triply periodic minimal surfaces
[art]   Truchet Pipes         — randomized quarter-circle tiles forming infinite looping plumbing
[art]   Moebius Knot Work     — intertwined Celtic knots painted onto non-orientable surfaces
[art]   Kaleidoscope Raytrace — bouncing a single beam of light thousands of times
[art]   Plasma Fractal        — diamond-square algorithms generating retro demoscene clouds
[art]   Cymatic Water         — liquid surface distortion driven by deep bass frequencies
[art]   Epicycloid Gears      — rolling circles tracing out planetary mechanical paths
[art]   Apollonian Gasket     — infinitely nesting tangent circles packed inside one another
[art]   Cellular Slime        — organic, squishy blobs merging and dividing based on proximity
[art]   Bifurcation Diagram   — plotting the exact moments where chaos splits into order
[art]   Soap Film Minimal     — dipping wireframes into a physics simulator to form tension planes
[art]   Generative Glitch     — precise math equations purposefully broken for aesthetic artifacts
[art]   Spectral Flow         — mapping vector field velocities to an HSV color wheel gradient

# Story (40)
[story] The Demon Core        — a slipped screwdriver, a blue flash, and a physicist's fatal mistake
[story] The Shade Balls       — dumping 96 million black spheres into a reservoir to stop chemistry
[story] Faster Than Wind      — the Blackbird land yacht that breaks the laws of intuition
[story] 100,000 Holes         — how a simple pegboard revealed the hidden statistics of randomness
[story] The Infinite Hotel    — a paradox where a fully booked hotel can always fit one more guest
[story] Empty Space Drop      — how a bowling ball and feather fall perfectly in a giant vacuum
[story] The Double Slit       — an electron acts as a wave until the universe catches it looking
[story] Slower Than Light     — the exact speed at which electricity actually flows through a wire
[story] The Centennial Light  — a bulb in a California fire station that has burned for 120 years
[story] Anti-Gravity Tube     — how you can spin a cylinder to make objects seemingly defy gravity
[story] The Number 42         — how mathematicians finally solved the sum of three cubes
[story] The Magnus Effect     — dropping a spinning basketball from the top of a massive dam
[story] The Roundest Object   — a flawless silicon sphere created to redefine the kilogram
[story] The Illusion of Time  — how your brain edits reality to trick you about when events happen
[story] Seeing the Unseeable  — the algorithm that stitched together the first image of a black hole
[story] Closed Timelike Curve — how general relativity makes time travel mathematically sound
[story] Spooky Action Proven  — Einstein's entanglement doubts crushed by bell inequality tests
[story] Monty Hall Problem    — why switching doors gives you a 66% chance of winning the car
[story] The Chicxulub Impact  — tracing the asteroid event to the exact hour the dinosaurs died
[story] Nuclear Dice          — proving radioactive decay rates using 1,000 violently shaking dice
[story] Incompleteness Theory — Gödel proving that some truths can never be mathematically verified
[story] Laser Light Sails     — using radiation pressure from photons to propel ships to other stars
[story] The Coriolis Myth     — how Earth's rotation dictates weather, but not the flush of a toilet
[story] Galvani's Frog        — the bizarre twitching amphibian legs that discovered electricity
[story] The Supersonic Whip   — the physics of a leather bullwhip cracking faster than sound
[story] The Mirror Flip       — the geometric reason why mirrors flip left to right, but never up
[story] Spark-Gap Transmitter — how raw high-voltage sparks accidentally invented wireless radio
[story] The Bismuth Staircase — melting toxic-looking metal on a stove to grow iridescent crystals
[story] Why The Sky Is Purple — how our eyes filter atmospheric scattering to see blue instead
[story] Magnetic Braking      — why dropping a magnet through a copper pipe slows it down
[story] Ant Algorithms        — how a blind colony uses complex pheromone logic to solve mazes
[story] Turing's Bombe        — the electro-mechanical rotors that cracked the Enigma code
[story] Benford's Law         — the unexpected ubiquity of the number 1 in tax fraud and nature
[story] The Tacoma Narrows    — how aeroelastic flutter, not simple resonance, collapsed a bridge
[story] The Mpemba Effect     — the counter-intuitive anomaly where hot water freezes faster
[story] Weighing The Earth    — how the Cavendish experiment measured planetary mass in a shed
[story] Stimulated Emission   — the quantum leap required to align photons into a laser beam
[story] The Eclipse of 1919   — how starlight bending around the sun proved general relativity
[story] Atomic Time Dilation  — how precision clocks prove that your head ages faster than your feet
[story] Zeno's Arrow          — the philosophical paradox that an arrow in flight is always at rest
